changes.description: Comprehensive OPERATOR cognitive flow audit — 17 sections covering zone inventory (26 sections + 4 shell elements), zone-by-zone cognitive classification (10 dimensions per zone), label explainability audit (35 labels), SPINE/DNA/Chronicle/PI/SW-INTEL/SQO mapping (7 layers), Frankenstein symptom inventory (15 symptoms), current flow assessment, proposed 8-step cognitive flow model, keep/move/explain/remove recommendations, recommended next stream
Execution report — pre-flight verification, 4 execution steps (code audit, browser audit, compilation), governance confirmation
Validation log — 18/18 checks PASS covering all acceptance criteria
Closure document — COMPLETE status, G1 architecture memory propagation
